originalTitle: Plan to scrap presidential elections puts Zimbabweans at loggerheads
title: Plan to scrap presidential elections puts Zimbabweans at loggerheads
content: The ruling party has unveiled a draft law that strips voters of the chance to elect the president.

originalTitle: Ringleader of suspected human trafficking network arrested in Ethiopia
title: Ringleader of suspected human trafficking network arrested in Ethiopia
content: Yetbarek Dawit is alleged to have operated a multi-million-dollar operation, using torture to raise money.

originalTitle: Carnival fever hits Lagos as locals celebrate Afro-Brazilian heritage
title: Carnival fever hits Lagos as locals celebrate Afro-Brazilian heritage
content: The centuries-old Fanti Carnival returned to Nigeria on Monday with a burst of colour and spectacle.

originalTitle: Billionaire investor Ackman makes $64bn bid for Universal Music Group
title: Billionaire investor Ackman makes $64bn bid for Universal Music Group
content: Universal Music, the label behind superstars Taylor Swift and Bad Bunny, is expected to list in NY from Amsterdam.

originalTitle: Trump suspends Iran bombing for two weeks following dire threats
title: Trump suspends Iran bombing for two weeks following dire threats
content: The US president nevertheless warned that the suspension was dependent on Iran reopening the Strait of Hormuz.

originalTitle: What we know about Pakistan’s proposed Iran war pause
title: What we know about Pakistan’s proposed Iran war pause
content: Pakistan’s Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif says diplomatic efforts to resolve the US-Israeli war on Iran are progressing.

originalTitle: Tracking recent US-Israeli strikes on Iranian infrastructure
title: Tracking recent US-Israeli strikes on Iranian infrastructure
content: Attacks have targeted bridges, steel plants and pharmaceutical facilities, verified videos show.

originalTitle: Wireless Festival cancelled after Kanye West blocked from coming to UK
title: Wireless Festival cancelled after Kanye West blocked from coming to UK
content: West was due to headline the festival in July but drew criticism over past antisemitic comments.

originalTitle: Has Artemis II shown we can land on the Moon again?
title: Has Artemis II shown we can land on the Moon again?
content: The Artemis II mission has been near flawless to date, but has the test flight shown Nasa is ready to send humans to the lunar surface?

originalTitle: World's best keeper? Raya helps Arsenal get back on track
title: World's best keeper? Raya helps Arsenal get back on track
content: David Raya is the best goalkeeper in the world, according to his Arsenal team-mates - and the Spaniard played a key role in his side's 1-0 win at Sporting.

originalTitle: Alexander-Arnold fails to ease Tuchel concerns as Kane stars
title: Alexander-Arnold fails to ease Tuchel concerns as Kane stars
content: Thomas Tuchel's doubts about Trent Alexander-Arnold and reliance on Harry Kane are confirmed on the England manager's Madrid mission.

title: 'We've become quite experienced in negativity'
content: Arne Slot says Liverpool have no chance against Paris St-Germain unless his side turns up for 90 minutes - after disagreeing with Virgil Van Dijk's comments about the team giving up.
